title: 'Very Sorry': Doc Who Joked About Size Of Male Corpses' Genitals At Pranit More's Show Apologises After Video Goes Viral
description: A video of a female doctor, Sejal Pawar, joking about the size of the genitals of male corpses on an old stand-up comedy show of Pranit More, has gone viral on social media, sparking public outrage. Pawar issued a public apology after facing massive backlash.
